title: Eurowrap Medium Christmas Merry & Bright Tree Gift Bag – Gold Foil Present Bag with Festive Tree Artwork – Twisted Rope Handle – Recyclable Paper for Seasonal Wrapping
features: MEDIUM CHRISTMAS GIFT BAG – Measures 25 cm x 21.5 cm x 10 cm – ideal for books, clothing, beauty sets and more
ELEGANT GOLD TREE DESIGN – “Merry & Bright” festive tree with gold foil embossing for a premium finish
QUALITY KRAFT PAPER – Made from 210gsm FSC-certified textured white kraft for durability and style
STURDY ROPE HANDLE – Strong gold twisted rope handle with matching tag for a personal message
RECYCLABLE & REUSABLE – Eco-friendly paper bag that’s both recyclable and suitable for reuse
description: Give your seasonal presents a touch of sophistication with the Eurowrap Medium Christmas Merry & Bright Tree Gift Bag. Featuring a clean white textured kraft background, the bag is adorned with a beautifully designed gold foil tree motif and the heartfelt phrase “May your days be merry and bright.” The lustrous foil details add an elegant shimmer, while the sturdy twisted gold rope handle ensures both comfort and durability. A matching gift tag is included, ready for your personal message. Measuring 25 cm x 21.5 cm x 10 cm, this medium-sized bag is perfect for clothing, books, beauty sets, or other mid-sized presents. Made from high-quality 210gsm FSC-certified paper, it’s designed for strength while remaining fully recyclable after use. Gusseted sides give extra room for bulkier gifts, and the premium finish makes it suitable for both casual and formal gifting occasions. Whether it’s for friends, family, or colleagues, this stylish medium Christmas gift bag offers a quick, eco-friendly alternative to wrapping paper, helping your present look beautifully packaged in seconds.
